chunks.text: Technical Reports - Robert G. Meyer. Analysis and Design of Wideband LC VCOs (EECS-2006-50) Axel Dominique Berny, Robert G. Meyer and Ali Niknejad. Cyclostationary Noise in Communication Systems (M99/36) M.T. Terrovitis and Robert G. Meyer.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the technical reports listed for Robert G. Meyer?
chunks.answer: Wideband LC VCOs and Cyclostationary Noise.
